zh.Old Romney, Kent, England: 英國肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Allen Eppes於1425年出生在英國肯特布倫特時，他的父親John Eppes of Brenzete36歲，母親Martha Jones36歲。他於1454年與Anne Bennedicta Bennett在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年9月9日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國肯特。

zh-hans.Old Romney, Kent, England: 英国肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Allen Eppes于1425年出生在英国肯特布倫特时，他的父亲John Eppes of Brenzete36岁，母亲Martha Jones36岁。他于1454年与Anne Bennedicta Bennett在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年9月9日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国肯特。

nameMeanings.name: Eppes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Epps
meanings: English: from Middle English (h)apse, (h)aspe ‘aspen tree, white poplar’ (Old English æpse, æspe). Generally, this was a topographic name for someone who lived by an aspen tree or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Apps in Surrey, Apse Manor on the Isle of Wight, or The Asps in Warwickshire.

English: perhaps from the Middle English personal name Eppe, a possible survival of Old English Eoppa, or its female counterpart Eoppe (Latinized in post-Conquest records as Eppa), probably from a stem eorp- ‘red’. Alternatively, Eppe may derive from Old Norse Øpi, perhaps from the stem øp- found in the verb øpa ‘to cry out, shriek’.
American shortened form of   Van Epps  , a surname of Dutch origin.

nameMeanings.name: Allen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , in Britain generally found only as a surname, but in North America equally common as a given name.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Allen Eppes was born in 1425, in Brenzett, Kent, England, his father, John Eppes of Brenzete, was 36 and his mother, Martha Jones, was 36. He married Anne Bennedicta Bennett in 1454, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 September 1471, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Allen Eppes est né en 1425, à Brenzett, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Eppes of Brenzete, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Martha Jones, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Anne Bennedicta Bennett en 1454, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1471, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Allen Eppes 1425 in Brenzett, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Eppes of Brenzete 36 und seine Mutter Martha Jones 36. Er hat 1454 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Anne Bennedicta Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1471 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Allen Eppes è nato il nel 1425 nel Brenzett, Kent, England, il suo padre, John Eppes of Brenzete, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Martha Jones, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Anne Bennedicta Bennett nel 1454, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 settembre 1471, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Allen Eppesが1425年にイギリスケントブレンズエットで生まれた時，父John Eppes of Brenzeteは36歳，母Martha Jonesは36歳であった。1454年にイギリスイギリスケントでAnne Bennedicta Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年9月9日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Allen Eppes(이)가 1425년 영국 켄트 브렌즈트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Eppes of Brenzete(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Martha Jones(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Anne Bennedicta Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 9월 9일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Allen Eppes nasceu em 1425, em Brenzett, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Eppes of Brenzete, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Martha Jones, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Bennedicta Bennett em 1454, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1471, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Allen Eppes родился в 1425 г. в местности брензетт, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Eppes of Brenzete было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Jones, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Bennedicta Bennett в 1454 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 сентября 1471 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Allen Eppes nació en 1425, en Brenzett, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Eppes of Brenzete, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Martha Jones, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Anne Bennedicta Bennett en 1454, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1471, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Kent, Inglaterra.
